name: Linear
description: Create, read, update, and list issues in Linear via GraphQL
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Linear API action to perform.

teamId.label: Team ID
teamId.description: Linear team ID. Used by: Create Issue, List Issues.

title.label: Title
title.description: Issue title. Used by: Create Issue, Update Issue.

description.label: Description
description.description: Issue description (Markdown). Used by: Create Issue, Update Issue.

issueId.label: Issue ID
issueId.description: Linear issue ID. Used by: Get Issue, Update Issue.

stateId.label: State ID
stateId.description: Workflow state ID. Used by: Update Issue.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Priority level (0=none, 1=urgent, 2=high, 3=medium, 4=low). Used by: Create Issue, Update Issue.

assigneeId.label: Assignee ID
assigneeId.description: User ID to assign. Used by: Create Issue, Update Issue.
